scripts.build:assets: bunx tsc --noEmit && bunx tailwindcss -i ./web/src/input.css -o ./web/public/styles.css && bun build ./web/src/index.ts --outdir=./web/public && templ generate && GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm tinygo build -o ./web/public/main.wasm ./web/wasm
scripts.build: bun run build:assets && bun run build:go
